roles.heading: Porogaramu imwe ku bantu bose
roles.subheading: Niba ushaka kureba gusa, kwinjira mu mukino, cyangwa kuyobora – Footeee irakurinda.

guest.title: Umushyitsi
guest.description: Reba ibyiza by'umupira ku bwende bwawe.
guest.longDescription: Reba imikino yose iri butaha, amakuru y'aho bikorerwa, n'abakinnyi bahari – byose nta konti usabwa. Birakwiriye abakunda umupira.

player.title: Umukinnyi
player.description: Umukino wawe ukurikira uri mu minota mike gusa!
player.longDescription: Injira mu mikino ukanda rimwe, reba abandi bakina, kandi ubone amakuru igihe umwanya ufunguwe cyangwa umukino ugiye gutangira.

manager.title: Umuyobozi
manager.description: Reka Footeee irinde isi yawe y'umupira!
manager.longDescription: Kugenzura byose ku mikino, amakipe, n'abakinnyi. Kora imikino, shyiraho amakipe, kurikirana ubwitabire, kandi uyobore umuryango wawe w'umupira.

privacy.title: Politiki y'ubwiru
privacy.intro: Footeee ("twe", "yacu") ikora porogaramu ya Footeee yo kuri telefoni ("Porogaramu") n'uru rubuga. Iyi politiki y'ubwiru isobanura uko dukusanya, dukoresha, dutanga, kandi turinda amakuru yawe igihe ukoresha Porogaramu n'ibindi bikorwa bijyanye.
privacy.section1Item1: Amakuru ya konti (urugero: izina, aderesi ya imeyili, amakuru yo kwinjira mu buryo bwizewe).
privacy.section1Item2: Amakuru yo gukoresha porogaramu (urugero: imikino ukora/winjiramo, amakipe, aho bikorerwa, n'ibikorwa).
privacy.section1Item3: Amakuru ya igikoresho/ikoranabuhanga (urugero: ubwoko bw'igikoresho, verisiyo ya OS, verisiyo ya porogaramu, ibipimo).
privacy.section2Item2: Gutanga serivisi z'ibanze nko gukora imikino, kwinjira, no kuyobora amakipe.
privacy.section2Item5: Kurinda umutekano n'ubudahemuka bya serivisi zacu.
privacy.section3Text: Dushobora gusangira amakuru gusa igihe bisabwa kugira serivisi ikore, gukurikiza amategeko, cyangwa kurinda uburenganzira n'umutekano. Urugero, dushobora gukoresha abatanga ibikorwa remezo (hosting, imeyili, n'ibindi) bakora amakuru ku izina ryacu mu buryo bwizewe.
privacy.section4Text: Dukoresha uburyo bwiza bw'ikoranabuhanga n'imiterere yo kurinda amakuru yawe (urugero: HTTPS, kugenzura ubwinjire). Nta buryo bwo kohereza cyangwa kubika buri gihe bwizewe 100%, bityo ntidushobora kwemeza umutekano wuzuye.
privacy.section5Text: Tubika amakuru bwite igihe cyose bisabwa kugira serivisi itangwe kandi ku mpamvu zemewe z'ubucuruzi (urugero: gukurikiza amategeko, umutekano, gukemura amakimbirane), keretse amategeko asaba igihe kirekire.
privacy.section6Text: Dukurikije aho uherereye (harimo UK/EU), ushobora kuba ufite uburenganzira bwo kubona, gukosora, gusiba, cyangwa kubuza ikoreshwa ry'amakuru yawe bwite, no gusaba ko akoreshwa ahandi. Kugira ukoreshe ubu burenganzira, tuvugishe.
privacy.section7Text: Footeee ntiyakorewe abana bari munsi y'imyaka 13. Ntidukusanya amakuru bwite y'abana bari munsi y'imyaka 13 tubimenye.
privacy.section8Text: Dushobora guhindura iyi politiki mu gihe runaka. Impinduka zishyirwa kuri uru rupapuro hamwe n'itariki nshya ya "Iheruka guhindurwa".

deleteData.title: Siba amakuru yanjye
deleteData.description: Ufite uburenganzira bwo gusaba gusibwa kwa konti yawe n'amakuru bwite ajyanye nayo. Dukora ibyifuzo mu minsi 30.
deleteData.successMessage: Icyifuzo cyawe cyateguwe. Ohereze imeyili yafunguwe muri porogaramu yawe y'imeyili. Tuzabikora mu minsi 30.
deleteData.scopeFull: Byose — siba konti yanjye n'amakuru yose
deleteData.scopeData: Amakuru gusa — komeza konti ariko usibe amakuru y'ibikorwa
deleteData.confirmLabel: Ndemera ko iki gikorwa kidashobora gusubizwaho.
deleteData.emailRequired: Nyamuneka andika imeyili ijyanye na konti yawe.
